description: CompositionBlue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and a softly ribbed neckline, adidas 3-Stripes printed on the back, navy blue panel stitch asymmetrically across the chest, brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest and branding printed on the right chest FitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis sporty grey and blue T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The navy blue panel looks great, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable cotton keeps you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo
